home.servicesTitle: We offer comprehensive design of road infrastructure.

about.title: Professionalism & Experience
about.p1: We are a specialized engineering team providing the design and approval of road traffic and transport organization schemes throughout Georgia.
about.p2: Our mission is to ensure the safe, compliant, and efficient planning of road infrastructure for both temporary and permanent urban works.
about.agreementsDesc: Every project undergoes full legal and technical validation with the relevant state authorities:
about.gov1Desc: Ministry of Internal Affairs of Georgia
about.gov2Desc: Transport and Urban Development Agency of Tbilisi

services.subtitle: Professional engineering services covering all aspects of road and transport planning.
services.ctaDesc: Contact us today for full legal and technical consultations regarding Patrol Police and Municipal Transport Agency requirements.

list.title: Traffic Scheme Preparation
list.desc: Complete planning and design of permanent and temporary traffic flows.

list.title: Temporary Road Routing
list.desc: Safe movement plans for construction and extensive rehabilitation zones.

list.title: Construction Acts Preparation
list.desc: Preparation of technical documentation strictly according to City Hall rules.

list.title: State Approvals
list.desc: Official coordination directly with the Patrol Police and Transport Agency.

list.title: Urban Planning Consulting
list.desc: Expert recommendations on standards, clearances, and modern road safety.

list.title: Heavy Machinery Logistics
list.desc: Specialized routing plans for the movement of oversized construction equipment.

list.title: Water Supply Networks
list.desc: Road excavation schemes and authorizations during pipe installation.

list.title: Sewage Networks Installation
list.desc: Traffic management for urban drainage and sewage rehabilitation.

projects.subtitle: Archive of successfully implemented and legally approved projects.
projects.ctaDesc: We will help you prepare and agree upon your traffic schemes in the shortest possible timeframe.
